who: restaurant accounting staff processing 20-50 cash register reconciliations/day
offer: For restaurant accounting staff processing 20-50 cash register reconciliations/day, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual reconciliation of cash registers is time-consuming and prone to errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant accounting staff
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach with demo video to target users
Community forums where accounting staff share tools
try_it: Let users try daily transaction summary and error detection alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
